evidence.summary: Bulk XBRL accounts ZIP archive index

finding: Companies House accounts data product reachable; Gazette returned corporate-insolvency notices (count unavailable in this response) in the queried slice.
method: Existence: Companies House bulk accounts product + Gazette insolvency feed both reachable; per-firm Altman Z'' screen blocked on live API key.
notes: Per-firm Altman Z'' screening at scale requires the Companies House live REST API (key-gated). Apply at https://developer.company-information.service.gov.uk/ and store as the COMPANIES_HOUSE_API_KEY org secret to upgrade this from PLAUSIBLE to PROVEN.
